lint.note: ruff lint/format are included in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh

type-check.note: mypy is required in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh; CI type-check is path-gated to code changes plus weekly/manual.

security.note: bandit is included in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh; CI bandit is path-gated to code changes plus weekly/manual.

semgrep.note: semgrep runs only in heavy CI mode (manual/nightly).

secret-scan.note: gitleaks diff scan runs in PR CI; full-history scan runs weekly/manual.

dependency-audit.note: pip-audit is required in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh and runs in heavy CI mode weekly/manual.

license-check.note: pip-licenses allowlist check is in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh

pre-commit.note: pre-commit is covered by stricter canonical local pipeline checks

docs-contract.note: docs-contract is CI-only/path-gated for cost control.

pipeline-contract.note: contract validation runs locally via scripts/check_pipeline_contract.py

risk-classifier.note: risk classifier is CI policy logic that decides whether required E2E must run.

required-e2e-gate.note: required Docker E2E + required Discord E2E gate; canonical local full gate is scripts/test-full.sh.

zetherion-boundary-check.note: Top-level cgs/** is blocked in local pre-push and CI boundary checks.

unit-test.note: unit tests with coverage >=90% are required locally; CI unit tests are path-gated, with 3.12 on PR code changes and 3.13 weekly/manual.

integration-test.note: integration suites run in canonical local pipeline and heavy CI mode (weekly/manual).
